nasb.text: You will bring them and plant them in the mountain of Your inheritance, The place, O Lord, which You have made for Your dwelling, The sanctuary, O Lord, which Your hands have established.

esv.text: You will bring them in and plant them on your own mountain, the place, O Lord, which you have made for your abode, the sanctuary, O Lord, which your hands have established.

cnv.text: 你要把他們領進去，栽種在你產業的山上，耶和華啊，就是在你為自己預備的住處；主啊，就是在你手建立的聖所上。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊， 你要带领自己的子民到你的山上安居—— 到你为自己所造的住处， 主啊，到你亲手建的圣所。
